economic_notes: Government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Ojibway Paradise Resort, Bingo Palace, 1157065 Ontario Inc. (o/a Eagle Lake Contractors), Migisi Logging, Recreation (Arena) Operations, Concession Operation. Net loss from business enterprises of $191,615 in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Province is Ontario based on auditor address in Winnipeg MB but entity is Eagle Lake First Nation in Ontario. Six government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis (not consolidated line-by-line). Incomplete projects balance of $9,775,909 is treated as deferred revenue/liability. Net debt position of $1,180,885 (negative net financial assets). Restricted cash includes Replacement Reserve Fund ($174,973) and Operating Reserve Fund ($240,812). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($7,197,557) + Health Canada ($4,723,627) + Federal other ($57,000) + Province of Ontario ($3,957,316) + CMHC rental subsidies ($146,057) = $16,081,557. OSR includes business enterprises net and other revenue less incomplete projects transfer. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text.
